headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $109
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $107 to $109.
